description: A research librarian is preparing a bibliography that requires full, unabbreviated journal titles. Locate four specific classic papers in the Zotero library and update their 'Publication' field from the current abbreviation to the official full title: for Einstein (1905) 'On the Electrodynamics of Moving Bodies', change 'Ann. Phys.' to 'Annalen der Physik'; for McCarthy (1960) 'Recursive Functions...', change 'Comm. ACM' to 'Communications of the ACM'; for Dijkstra (1959) 'A Note on Two Problems...', change 'Numer. Math.' to 'Numerische Mathematik'; and for Shannon (1948) 'A Mathematical Theory of Communication', change 'Bell Syst. Tech. J.' to 'Bell System Technical Journal'.

einstein.title: On the Electrodynamics of Moving Bodies

dijkstra.title: A Note on Two Problems in Connexion with Graphs
